# Enzym3 Entertainment

## What we do
Enzym3 Entertainment is a professional DJ and event coordination service based in Tucson, Arizona, serving Tucson, Phoenix, and Scottsdale. We specialize in weddings, quinceañeras, birthdays, corporate events, and Sweet 16 parties.

## Services
- Wedding DJ services
- Quinceañera DJ and coordination
- Birthday and Sweet 16 DJ
- Corporate event DJ
- Full event coordination and music planning

## How to book
Visit https://plan.enzym3entertainment.vip to submit an inquiry or log in to your private client portal. Clients receive access to a personalized portal to sign contracts, pay deposits, submit vibe sheets with music preferences, and manage their event.

## Contact
- Phone: (520) 406-8600
- Email: booking@enzym3entertainment.vip
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/dj_enzym3/
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/DJEnzyme520/
- SoundCloud: https://soundcloud.com/djenzym3
- X (Twitter): https://x.com/dj_enzym3

## Service area
Tucson, AZ (primary) · Phoenix, AZ · Scottsdale, AZ

## Pricing
Custom quotes based on event type, duration, and add-ons. Deposits required to hold your date.

## Client portal
Private portal at https://plan.enzym3entertainment.vip/app — contract signing, deposit payments, music/vibe sheet submission, and coordinator messaging. Staff and vendor portals are separate and not publicly accessible.
